prompt_used: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You neutralize the app but trigger cascading outages and civic panic." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
